title: Morax (Jun 19, 2026)
desc: I missed some of my old characters. I was kind of worried about the color palette, but then I found my boy Morax! Hes perfect for it!

title: Gals Can't Be Kind to Otaku!?
desc: Takuya Seo is a quiet otaku who keeps a low profile at school—until two gals from his class start talking to him!
